Financial Projections — Pet Health AI Startup

Initial funding: $50,000 seed budget for MVP development and launch.

Cost breakdown:
- Engineering (3 months MVP): $18,000
- Cloud infrastructure: $3,000
- Marketing and user acquisition: $12,000
- Legal and compliance: $5,000
- Design and UX: $7,000
- Contingency reserve: $5,000

Revenue model: Freemium with premium subscription at $9.99/month. Target 10,000 free users converting at 5% within 6 months. Expected MRR at month 6: $4,995.

Burn rate: $8,000/month post-launch. Runway with seed budget: approximately 6 months. Break-even projected at month 10 with 2,500 paying subscribers.

Key financial risks: Higher than expected customer acquisition costs, slower conversion rates, and infrastructure scaling costs during growth phase.
